name: Snyffus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>除</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>草</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 Plant-Type monster to select and destroy 1 face-up card your opponent controls. When a Plant-Type monster(s) on the field is destroyed while this card is in the Graveyard, you can Special Summon this card from the Graveyard. If you do, remove this card from play when it is removed from the field.
flavor: Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 Plant-Type monster to select and destroy 1 face-up card your opponent controls. When a Plant-Type monster(s) on the field is destroyed while this card is in the Graveyard, you can Special Summon this card from the Graveyard. If you do, remove this card from play when it is removed from the field.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
